sentences.sentence: In April 2002 an event took place which demonstrated one of the many applications of information theory.
sentences.translation: 2002年4月，一件展示信息论诸多应用之一的事件发生了。

structure.text: which demonstrated one of the many applications of information theory

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句修饰 event，说明事件展示了什么。
take place 是固定短语，表示“发生”，没有被动形式。

sentences.sentence: The space probe Voyager I, launched in 1977, had sent back spectacular images of Jupiter and Saturn and then soared out of the Solar System on a one-way mission to the stars.
sentences.translation: 1977年发射的“旅行者一号”太空探测器曾传回木星和土星的壮观图像，随后踏上驶出太阳系、飞向群星的单程任务。

structure.text: had sent back spectacular images of Jupiter and Saturn and then soared out of the Solar System
on a one-way mission to the stars

difficult_points: launched in 1977 是过去分词后置修饰探测器。
had sent back 与 soared 并列，过去完成时交代在后文事件前已完成的经历。

sentences.sentence: After 25 years of exposure to the freezing temperatures of deep space, the probe was beginning to show its age.
sentences.translation: 在暴露于深空严寒温度25年后，探测器开始显露老化迹象。

structure.text: After 25 years of exposure to the freezing temperatures of deep space

difficult_points: After 引出持续时间，exposure to 表示暴露于。
show its age 是拟人化表达，意为显露老化。

sentences.sentence: Sensors and circuits were on the brink of failing and NASA experts realized that they had to do something or lose contact with their probe forever.
sentences.translation: 传感器和电路濒临失灵，NASA专家意识到他们必须采取行动，否则将永远失去与探测器的联系。

structure.text: were on the brink of failing
that they had to do something or lose contact with their probe forever

difficult_points: on the brink of failing 表示即将失灵，of 后接动名词。
had to do something or lose... 是“必须……否则……”结构，or 后省略了 they would。

sentences.sentence: The solution was to get a message to Voyager I to instruct it to use spares to change the failing parts.
sentences.translation: 解决方案是向“旅行者一号”发送一条消息，指示它使用备用件更换正在失效的部件。

structure.text: to get a message to Voyager I
to instruct it to use spares to change the failing parts
to use spares to change the failing parts

difficult_points: 两个 to 不定式分别表示解决方案和消息的目的。
instruct it to use... 是“指示它做……”结构，failing 修饰 parts。

sentences.sentence: With the probe 12 billion kilometers from Earth, this was not an easy task.
sentences.translation: 探测器距离地球120亿公里之遥，这并不是一项容易的任务。

structure.text: With the probe 12 billion kilometers from Earth

difficult_points: with + 名词 + 地点构成独立结构，补充说明探测器的位置。
this 指向探测器发送并执行维修指令的任务。

sentences.sentence: By means of a radio dish belonging to NASA's Deep Space Network, the message was sent out into the depths of space.
sentences.translation: 借助属于NASA深空网络的一面射电天线，这条消息被发射到深空之中。

structure.text: By means of a radio dish belonging to NASA's Deep Space Network
belonging to NASA's Deep Space Network
was sent out into the depths of space

difficult_points: belonging to 修饰 radio dish；by means of 表示发送手段。
was sent out 是被动语态，out into 强调向外进入深空。

sentences.sentence: Even travelling at the speed of light, it took over 11 hours to reach its target, far beyond the orbit of Pluto.
sentences.translation: 即使以光速传播，消息也花了11个多小时才到达目标——远在冥王星轨道之外。

structure.text: Even travelling at the speed of light
took over 11 hours to reach its target
far beyond the orbit of Pluto

difficult_points: travelling 分词短语的逻辑主语是 message，描述传播速度。
it took...to reach 是耗时结构，it 指消息。

sentences.sentence: Yet, incredibly, the little probe managed to hear the faint call from its home planet and successfully made the switchover.
sentences.translation: 然而，令人难以置信的是，这个小小探测器设法听到了来自母星的微弱呼唤，并成功完成了切换。

structure.text: managed to hear the faint call from its home planet and successfully made the switchover

difficult_points: managed to hear 表示克服困难后成功听到。
and 连接 managed to hear 与 made the switchover 两个动作。

sentences.sentence: It was the longest-distance repair job in history, and a triumph for the NASA engineers.
sentences.translation: 这是历史上距离最远的维修任务，也是NASA工程师的一次胜利。

structure.text: the longest-distance repair job in history
and a triumph for the NASA engineers

difficult_points: it 指前文的探测器维修任务。
and 后省略了 was，a triumph 与前面的名词补语并列。

sentences.sentence: But it also highlighted the astonishing power of the techniques developed by American communications engineer Claude Shannon, who had died just a year earlier.
sentences.translation: 但它也凸显了美国通信工程师克劳德·香农所开发技术的惊人力量；香农就在一年前去世。

structure.text: the astonishing power of the techniques developed by American communications engineer Claude Shannon
developed by American communications engineer Claude Shannon
who had died just a year earlier

difficult_points: developed by... 修饰 techniques；who 从句补充说明 Shannon。
had died 使用过去完成时，参照维修事件说明去世更早。

sentences.sentence: Born in 1916 in Petoskey, Michigan, Shannon showed an early talent for maths and for building gadgets, and made breakthroughs in the foundations of computer technology when still a student.
sentences.translation: 香农1916年出生于密歇根州佩托斯基，很早就展现出数学和制作小装置的天赋，并在还是学生时就对计算机技术基础作出了突破。

structure.text: showed an early talent for maths and for building gadgets, and made breakthroughs in the foundations of computer technology

difficult_points: Born in... 是过去分词开头的背景结构，逻辑主语是 Shannon。
for maths 与 for building gadgets 并列修饰 talent；when still a student 省略了主语和 be。

sentences.sentence: While at Bell Laboratories, Shannon developed information theory, but shunned the resulting acclaim.
sentences.translation: 在贝尔实验室工作期间，香农创立了信息论，却避开了由此带来的赞誉。

structure.text: developed information theory, but shunned the resulting acclaim

difficult_points: While at... 省略了 Shannon was，表示工作期间。
but 连接 developed 与 shunned，resulting 修饰 acclaim。

sentences.sentence: In the 1940s, he single-handedly created an entire science of communication which has since inveigled its way into a host of applications, from DVDs to satellite communications to bar codes—any area, in short, where data has to be conveyed rapidly yet accurately.
sentences.translation: 20世纪40年代，他独自创立了完整的通信科学；此后，这门科学逐渐进入大量应用，从DVD、卫星通信到条形码——简言之，任何需要快速而准确传输数据的领域。

structure.text: single-handedly created an entire science of communication
which has since inveigled its way into a host of applications
from DVDs to satellite communications to bar codes
where data has to be conveyed rapidly yet accurately

difficult_points: which 修饰 science，has since 表示从那以后持续进入应用。
where 从句修饰 area；has to be conveyed 是数据传输的被动表达。

sentences.sentence: This all seems light years away from the down-to-earth uses Shannon originally had for his work, which began when he was a 22-year-old graduate engineering student at the prestigious Massachusetts Institute of Technology in 1939.
sentences.translation: 这一切似乎与香农最初为其工作设想的实际用途相距甚远；他的工作始于1939年，当时他是麻省理工学院一名22岁的工程学研究生。

structure.text: the down-to-earth uses Shannon originally had for his work
which began when he was a 22-year-old graduate engineering student at the prestigious Massachusetts Institute of Technology in 1939
when he was a 22-year-old graduate engineering student at the prestigious Massachusetts Institute of Technology in 1939

difficult_points: light years away 是夸张表达，意为相距甚远；down-to-earth 表示实际的。
which 修饰 work；when 从句说明工作开始时的时间和身份。

sentences.sentence: He set out with an apparently simple aim: to pin down the precise meaning of the concept of 'information'.
sentences.translation: 他带着一个看似简单的目标开始研究：确定“信息”这一概念的精确含义。

structure.text: set out with an apparently simple aim
to pin down the precise meaning of the concept of 'information'

difficult_points: set out 表示开始着手；to pin down 是 aim 的同位说明。
pin down 意为明确界定，而非字面上的“钉住”。

sentences.sentence: The most basic form of information, Shannon argued, is whether something is true or false—which can be captured in the binary unit, or 'bit', of the form 1 or 0.
sentences.translation: 香农认为，信息最基本的形式是判断某事为真还是假——这可以用1或0形式的二进制单位“比特”表示。

structure.text: The most basic form of information
is whether something is true or false
which can be captured in the binary unit, or 'bit', of the form 1 or 0

difficult_points: whether...or... 作表语，说明 information 的基本内容。
which 指前面的真假判断；or 'bit' 是 binary unit 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: Having identified this fundamental unit, Shannon set about defining otherwise vague ideas about information and how to transmit it from place to place.
sentences.translation: 确定这一基本单位后，香农开始界定有关信息以及如何把信息从一处传到另一处的模糊概念。

structure.text: set about defining otherwise vague ideas about information and how to transmit it from place to place
how to transmit it from place to place

difficult_points: Having identified 是完成时分词，表示先确定单位再开始定义。
set about 后接动名词 defining；how to transmit 是嵌入的不定式疑问结构。

sentences.sentence: In the process he discovered something surprising: it is always possible to guarantee information will get through random interference—'noise'—intact.
sentences.translation: 在这一过程中，他发现了令人惊讶的事情：总能确保信息完整地穿过随机干扰——“噪声”。

structure.text: it is always possible to guarantee information will get through random interference—'noise'—intact
information will get through random interference—'noise'—intact

difficult_points: guarantee 后接省略 that 的宾语从句；intact 作补语表示完整无损。
it is possible to... 是形式主语结构，真正内容是 to guarantee...。

sentences.sentence: Noise usually means unwanted sounds which interfere with genuine information.
sentences.translation: 噪声通常指干扰真实信息的无用声音。
difficult_points: which 修饰 sounds，说明声音如何影响信息。
interfere with 是固定搭配，表示干扰。

sentences.sentence: Information theory generalises this idea via theorems that capture the effects of noise with mathematical precision.
sentences.translation: 信息论通过能够精确以数学方式描述噪声影响的定理，将这一思想加以推广。

structure.text: via theorems that capture the effects of noise with mathematical precision
that capture the effects of noise with mathematical precision

difficult_points: via 表示实现推广的手段；that 修饰 theorems。
with mathematical precision 修饰 capture，说明精确程度。

sentences.sentence: In particular, Shannon showed that noise sets a limit on the rate at which information can pass along communication channels while remaining error-free.
sentences.translation: 香农特别指出，噪声会限制信息沿通信信道传输且保持无错误的速率。

structure.text: that noise sets a limit on the rate
at which information can pass along communication channels while remaining error-free

difficult_points: at which 修饰 rate，说明传输速率；while remaining 省略主语 information。
sets a limit on 表示对速率设置上限。

sentences.sentence: This rate depends on the relative strengths of the signal and noise travelling down the communication channel, and on its capacity (its 'bandwidth').
sentences.translation: 这一速率取决于沿通信信道传输的信号和噪声的相对强度，以及信道的容量（即“带宽”）。

structure.text: the relative strengths of the signal and noise travelling down the communication channel

difficult_points: depends on 后并列两个决定因素；travelling 修饰 signal and noise。
its 指 communication channel，括号解释 capacity 即 bandwidth。

sentences.sentence: The resulting limit, given in units of bits per second, is the absolute maximum rate of error-free communication given signal strength and noise level.
sentences.translation: 这个以每秒比特数为单位表示的结果上限，是在给定信号强度和噪声水平下无错误通信的绝对最高速率。

structure.text: given in units of bits per second
the absolute maximum rate of error-free communication given signal strength and noise level
given signal strength and noise level

difficult_points: 两个 given 短语分别说明单位和条件，后者是省略 being 的独立结构。
rate of error-free communication 是“无错误通信的速率”，不是通信错误率。

sentences.sentence: The trick, Shannon showed, is to find ways of packaging up—'coding'—information to cope with the ravages of noise, while staying within the information-carrying capacity—'bandwidth'—of the communication system being used.
sentences.translation: 香农指出，诀窍在于找到把信息打包（即“编码”）的方法，以应对噪声的破坏，同时保持在所用通信系统的信息承载能力——“带宽”——之内。

structure.text: is to find ways of packaging up—'coding'—information
to cope with the ravages of noise
while staying within the information-carrying capacity—'bandwidth'—of the communication system being used

difficult_points: is to find... 是表语不定式；coding 是 packaging up 的同位解释。
while staying... 省略主语，being used 修饰 communication system。

sentences.sentence: Over the years scientists have devised many such coding methods, and they have proved crucial in many technological feats.
sentences.translation: 多年来，科学家设计出了许多这样的编码方法，而它们已在许多技术壮举中发挥关键作用。

structure.text: and they have proved crucial in many technological feats

difficult_points: 现在完成时 have devised/proved 表示从过去到现在的成果。
prove crucial 表示“证明至关重要”，crucial 作主语补语。

sentences.sentence: The Voyager spacecraft transmitted data using codes which added one extra bit for every single bit of information; the result was an error rate of just one bit in 10,000—and stunningly clear pictures of the planets.
sentences.translation: “旅行者”航天器使用一种编码传输数据：每个信息比特增加一个额外比特；结果错误率仅为万分之一，并传回了清晰得惊人的行星图像。

structure.text: which added one extra bit for every single bit of information
the result was an error rate of just one bit in 10,000—and stunningly clear pictures of the planets

difficult_points: which 修饰 codes，说明编码增加比特的规则。
分号后 result 的表语并列错误率和图像效果。

sentences.sentence: Other codes have become part of everyday life—such as the Universal Product Code, or bar code, which uses a simple error-detecting system that ensures supermarket check-out lasers can read the price even on, say, a crumpled bag of crisps.
sentences.translation: 其他编码已成为日常生活的一部分，例如通用产品代码，也就是条形码；它使用简单的纠错检测系统，确保超市结账扫描器甚至能读出皱巴巴薯片袋上的价格。

structure.text: such as the Universal Product Code, or bar code
which uses a simple error-detecting system
that ensures supermarket check-out lasers can read the price even on, say, a crumpled bag of crisps

difficult_points: which 修饰 bar code；that 修饰 system，形成两层定语从句。
even on... 表示即使在皱褶包装上也能读取，say 是插入举例。

expressions.meaning_zh: 成为日常生活的一部分

sentences.sentence: As recently as 1993, engineers made a major breakthrough by discovering so-called turbo codes—which come very close to Shannon's ultimate limit for the maximum rate that data can be transmitted reliably, and now play a key role in the mobile videophone revolution.
sentences.translation: 就在1993年，工程师还通过发现所谓的涡轮码取得重大突破；这种编码非常接近香农关于数据可靠传输最高速率的终极极限，如今在移动可视电话革命中发挥关键作用。

structure.text: made a major breakthrough by discovering so-called turbo codes
which come very close to Shannon's ultimate limit for the maximum rate that data can be transmitted reliably
and now play a key role in the mobile videophone revolution
that data can be transmitted reliably

difficult_points: as recently as 强调时间之近；by discovering 说明取得突破的方式。
which 从句中两个谓语 come close 与 play a role 并列，that 修饰 maximum rate。

sentences.sentence: Shannon also laid the foundations of more efficient ways of storing information, by stripping out superfluous ('redundant') bits from data which contributed little real information.
sentences.translation: 香农还为更高效的信息存储方式奠定了基础，方法是从数据中删去几乎不提供有效信息的多余（“冗余”）比特。

structure.text: also laid the foundations of more efficient ways of storing information
by stripping out superfluous ('redundant') bits from data

difficult_points: by stripping out 说明奠定基础的方法；which 修饰 data。
lay the foundations of 是固定表达，表示为……奠定基础。

sentences.sentence: As mobile phone text messages like 'I CN C U' show, it is often possible to leave out a lot of data without losing much meaning.
sentences.translation: 正如“I CN C U”这样的手机短信所显示的，常常可以省略大量数据而不会损失太多含义。

structure.text: As mobile phone text messages like 'I CN C U' show
to leave out a lot of data without losing much meaning

difficult_points: As...show 是“正如……所显示的”插入性从句。
it is possible to... 是形式主语结构；without losing 表示省略的同时不损失意义。

sentences.sentence: As with error correction, however, there's a limit beyond which messages become too ambiguous.
sentences.translation: 不过，和纠错一样，消息也存在一个界限，超过这个界限就会变得过于含糊。

structure.text: a limit beyond which messages become too ambiguous
beyond which messages become too ambiguous

difficult_points: As with 表示“和……一样”；there is 结构的真正主语是 a limit。
beyond which 表示超过该界限，messages 是从句主语。

sentences.sentence: Shannon showed how to calculate this limit, opening the way to the design of compression methods that cram maximum information into the minimum space.
sentences.translation: 香农展示了如何计算这一界限，为设计把最大信息量压缩进最小空间的压缩方法铺平了道路。

structure.text: opening the way to the design of compression methods
that cram maximum information into the minimum space

difficult_points: how to calculate 是疑问词+不定式作宾语，表示计算方法。
opening the way... 是结果分词结构；that 修饰 compression methods。
